description: Google Play Developer Reporting provides programmatic access to reporting and Android vitals data for apps in a Google Play developer account. It is used for internal reporting, analysis, and automation around Play Console app quality metrics.
summary: Public MCP endpoint at `/mcp` plus a REST API at `https://playdeveloperreporting.googleapis.com/` for Google Play Developer Reporting data; the REST API uses Google OAuth 2.0 service-account access tokens.

surfaces.name: Google Play Developer Reporting MCP server
